dashboard.title: Macro View — Global Operations
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time portfolio intelligence across all regions
dashboard.regionalFilterDesc: Update globe, KPIs, and cards for a specific regional read.
dashboard.globalBriefDesc: The platform consolidates {{machines}} CASE machines, {{competitors}} rivals and {{hotspots}} competitive hotspots in the same operational read.
dashboard.regionalBriefDesc: {{region}} combines {{machines}} active models, {{families}} families and {{electrified}} electrified platforms in the monitored lineup.
dashboard.noCriticalAlerts: No critical alerts for the current slice.
dashboard.compareDemandEquip: Compare demand, trend and equipment between two regions side-by-side.
dashboard.summaryBalanced: {{regionA}} and {{regionB}} present operational balance in the current cut.
dashboard.summaryAdvantage: {{winner}} opens the largest advantage in {{metric}}, while {{trendWinner}} sustains the best trend momentum.

regionDetail.clickToFocus: Click on the side card to focus on the map
regionDetail.noEngineeringSignals: No additional engineering signals were mapped for this region.
regionDetail.allLayersHidden: All layers are hidden; reactivate CASE or Competitors to see points on the map again.
regionDetail.clickToFocusAndPopup: Click to focus the point and open the popup on the map.
regionDetail.noPointsMapped: No specific points were mapped for {{region}} in this slice.
regionDetail.summaryStats: {{dom}} CASE models lead key fronts, {{com}} sustain active commercialization and {{comp}} hotspots monitor competitive pressure in {{region}}.

nexusChat.title: NEXUS AI
nexusChat.subtitle: Portfolio Engineering
nexusChat.welcome:
🧠 **NEXUS AI**

I am the intelligence engine of the CASE Nexus platform. I know every product in the CASE portfolio, mapped global competitors, engineering scores of each subsystem, and identified competitive gaps.

I can help you with:
- Comparative analysis between any CASE product and competitors
- Identification of technical gaps and Next Gen recommendations
- Simulation of product evolution scenarios
- Comparative charts of technical specs
- Executive briefings for presentations

Ask me anything about the portfolio.
nexusChat.placeholder: Ask about any product, competitor, or strategy...

header.title: Subsystem Gap Heatmap
header.subtitle: Maturity by family × subsystem
header.instruction: Click a cell to navigate to the machine's subsystem.

header.title: Technology Readiness Timeline
header.subtitle: Temporal evolution by subsystem
header.instruction: Bars grouped by subsystem and colored by priority. Hover for details.

common.accessEnabled: Access to the assistant enabled and secure.
common.assistantOffline: The AI engine will be offline until you configure a new key.
common.assistantConnected: The NEXUS AI assistant is now connected to the Gemini API.

header.subtitle: Portfolio Engineer View — maturity, competitive gaps and CASE Construction technology roadmap.

suggestions.title: Strategic Intelligence Suggestions
suggestions.subtitle: Suggested actions from Competitive Trajectory and Field Intelligence.

prompt.explain: Explain risks, dependencies, competitive return and executive recommendation.

field.title: Field Intelligence
field.subtitle: Field data that calibrates product prioritization and closes the loop between engineering and sales.

charts.competitivePattern: Real competitive pattern that should feed benchmark and roadmap.

scanner.title: Web Scanner
scanner.subtitle: Analytical brain with filters by family, priority, competitive autocomplete and automatic gap/advantage signals.
scanner.searchPlaceholder: Enter competitor model or CASE product
scanner.noModelsFound: No models found in the database. Try another term.

regional.title: Regional Intelligence
regional.subtitle: What each market really needs — and where our gaps matter.
regional.fitMatrixDesc: Fit score weighted by regional relevance, CASE advantages and gaps that really matter.

portfolio.title: Portfolio Directory
portfolio.subtitle: Complete machine catalog and engineering indicators.

guide.title: Platform Guide
guide.subtitle: How every module, chart, and feature of CASE Nexus works.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Consolidated executive view
dashboard.description: Main panel that unifies portfolio, competitiveness, and market signals data. It is the starting point for any analysis.

features.kpis_detail: Total machines, average portfolio score, urgent signals, and families covered. Rapid health check.
features.map_detail: CASE presence points and competitive pressure. Click a region for details (machines, competitors, fit).
features.compare_detail: Select 2 regions in dropdowns to generate a comparative radar with demand, coverage, and gaps.
features.scanner_detail: Top 3 high-priority signals. Click to navigate to Scanner with signal focus.
features.video_detail: Institutional video synchronized with page scroll.

tips: Click a region on the map to open the dialog with covered machines and present competitors
If urgent signals > 0, click to investigate in the Scanner
Use the A vs B comparison to prepare executive presentations
dashboard.examplePrompt: What are the top 3 competitive risks for the CASE portfolio today?

portfolio.title: Portfolio Directory
portfolio.subtitle: Complete machine catalog
portfolio.description: Directory with 42+ CASE machines, multi-dimensional filters (family, region, power, weight, EV), comparison selection, and CSV export.

features.search_detail: Search by model, engine, family, or region. E.g., '821G', 'FPT', 'Electric'.
features.filters_detail: Family, region, category (Heavy/Light), power range (0-400hp), weight range (0-120,000lb), EV only.
features.select_detail: Select 2-4 machines with checkbox → click 'Compare selected' → goes to Benchmarking.
features.export_detail: Generates CSV file with all filtered data for spreadsheet use.
features.nav_detail: Click the arrow (→) next to any machine to go to Engineering Subsystems.

tips: To see excavators over 200hp in North America: Family 'E-Series' + Region 'North America' + Power 200-400
Select 2 machines from the same family for direct comparison in Benchmarking
Use the EV filter to map penetration of electric platforms
portfolio.examplePrompt: List all CASE machines with scores below 80 and suggest improvement priorities.

benchmarking.title: Competitor Benchmarking
benchmarking.subtitle: CASE vs competition in 3 layers
benchmarking.description: Technical comparison organized in 3 tabs: Direct Comparison, Competitive Trajectory, and Portfolio Prioritization.

features.compare_detail: Radar CASE vs competitor in 5 axes (Powertrain, Ergonomics, Tech, Maintenance, Price/TCO) + side-by-side spec table.
features.trajectory_detail: Timeline with past milestones and future projections by brand (Cat, Komatsu, Volvo, Deere, JCB).
features.prioritization_detail: Strategic matrix positioning families by score vs competitive pressure (Leaders, Bets, Cash Cows, Questionable).
features.roadmap_detail: In the Trajectory tab, convert competitor projections into suggestions for the Next Gen Roadmap.

tips: To present to the board: Comparison Tab → Select CX300E → Click Komatsu PC300 → Use radar + table
In Trajectory, monitor Cat and Komatsu moves in machine control and electrification
Use 'Send to Roadmap' when identifying a competitive move that requires response
benchmarking.examplePrompt: Compare the 821G with the top 3 competitors and show where we are most vulnerable.

subsystems.title: Engineering Subsystems
subsystems.subtitle: Drill-down by engineering subsystem
subsystems.description: Technical decomposition of each machine into 6 subsystems (Structure, Powertrain, Hydraulics, Transmission, Implements, Cabin) with real data vs competition.

features.selection_detail: Horizontal cards with all machines. Click to select. Score displayed below the name.
features.tabs_detail: Structure (EST), Powertrain (PWR), Hydraulics (HID), Transmission (TRN), Implements (IMP), Cabin (CAB).
features.analysis_detail: Text analysis of current state + yellow box with the main identified gap.
features.radar_detail: SVG comparing CASE vs competitor on all 6 axes simultaneously.
features.competitors_detail: Score by competitor with delta (▲/▼) and description of competitive position.
features.components_detail: Expands subcomponent tree with public specs, editable internal data, and opportunities.
features.ai_detail: Sends component with specs, gaps, and competition for analysis by NexusChat.

tips: To analyze hydraulic gap: Select CX300E → Hydraulics tab → see gap + score → 'Analyze with AI'
Each internal data field can be edited — ideal for validating real vs public specs
Component progress bar shows how many fields have been validated
subsystems.examplePrompt: Analyze the hydraulic subsystem of the CX300E and suggest 3 actions for MY2028.

regional.title: Regional Intelligence
regional.subtitle: Demand and competitiveness by region
regional.description: Profile of 5 macro-regions: North America, Europe, Latin America, Middle East & Africa, Asia Pacific. Each with demand, gaps, and strategic recommendations.

features.profile_detail: Market size, annual revenue, CASE presence, top regional competitors.
features.demand_detail: Ranked list of required features (Machine Control, Telematics, Electrification etc.) with weight and trend.
features.gap_detail: Each CASE gap classified as CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM etc. with numerical score.
features.machines_detail: Which CASE products serve the region + regional fit score (0-100).
features.recommendations_detail: 3 prioritized actions per region, contextualized to the local market.

tips: LATAM values robustness and SCR-only, NOT 3D Machine Control — strategy should reflect this
Europe and NA drive electrification and machine control — prioritize roadmap investment in these regions
Regional fit below 70 indicates the product needs adaptation for the region
regional.examplePrompt: What differentiates the ideal CASE strategy for LATAM vs Europe?

roadmap.title: Next Gen Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: Technological evolution of the portfolio
roadmap.description: Planning center for the Portfolio Engineer. Connects maturity, gaps, investment, and technology timeline in 3 phases (MY2027-MY2029).

features.scorecard_detail: 5 KPIs: Readiness (% models ≥85), Gap Coverage (% items in action), EV Penetration, Competitive Parity, Field→Roadmap.
features.heatmap_detail: Interactive families × 6 subsystems table with scores and roadmap badges. Click navigates to Subsystems.
features.kanban_detail: 3 colunas: Fase 1 (MY2027), Fase 2 (MY2028), Fase 3 (MY2029). Cards coloridos por prioridade and cost.
features.investment_detail: Bars per phase + grand total in $M. Shows investment distribution.
features.impact_detail: Line chart showing CASE score vs competitor line across 3 phases.
features.timeline_detail: Horizontal Gantt by subsystem. Color-coded bars by priority. Cross-dependency section.
features.status_detail: Dropdown per item: Proposed → Approved → In Development → Implemented (or Postponed/Rejected).

tips: Phase 1 (MY2027) focuses on quick wins: standard weighing, display upgrade, premium undercarriage
Native Grade Assist (road-004) is the item with highest Δ Score (+13) — critical priority
Use the heatmap to identify which families are weakest in which subsystems
roadmap.examplePrompt: What is the competitive return of native Grade Assist if implemented in 2028?

field.title: Field Intelligence
field.subtitle: Field data (wins, losses, feedback)
field.description: Capture and analysis of field reports to close the engineering ↔ sales loop. Wins, losses, and feedback automatically feed the roadmap.

features.form_detail: Type (Win/Loss/Feedback), CASE Product, Region, Competitor, Reason, Missing/Decisive Feature, Value, Comments.
features.kpis_detail: Win Rate, Losses, Top Loss Reason, Top Feature Request, Most Lost To — calculated in real-time.
features.reasons_detail: Donut chart with loss reason distribution.
features.requested_detail: Horizontal bars with top 5 features grouped by theme (Machine Control, CVT, People Detection etc.).
features.competitors_detail: Bars showing which brands beat CASE most often.
features.feed_detail: When a theme repeats 2+ times, it generates an automatic suggestion in the Next Gen Roadmap.

tips: Record ALL losses, not just the important ones — the pattern emerges from frequency
The 'Missing Feature' field directly feeds roadmap suggestions
Use 'Analyze with AI' to generate a strategic report from field patterns
field.examplePrompt: Based on recent losses, which feature should be priority #1?

scanner.title: Web Scanner
scanner.subtitle: Automated competitive intelligence
scanner.description: Analytical engine that automatically compares CASE vs competitor products and generates gap or advantage signals with priority (High/Medium/Low).

features.autocomplete_detail: Search any CASE or competitor product. The system automatically finds and correlates.
features.analysis_detail: Click to cross specs and generate insights. If a product is selected, focus on it; otherwise, analyze everything.
features.signals_detail: Cards with severity icons (🔴 High, 🟡 Medium, 🟢 Low), description, action, and source.
features.task_detail: Transforms the signal into an engineering task and navigates to Subsystems with proper context.
features.feed_detail: Repeated field losses appear as automatic signals with 'NEW' badge.

tips: Select a specific competitor before clicking 'Generate analysis' for focused results
'High' signals should be treated as priority — use 'Convert to Task' immediately
The Scanner is self-feeding: Field Intelligence data generates signals automatically
scanner.examplePrompt: Analyze the High signals from the Scanner and prioritize the top 3 for immediate action.

convergence.title: Construction-Ag Convergence
convergence.subtitle: Hybrid Operation Setup Simulator
convergence.description: Intelligent MatchMaker that validates and projects the fit of construction machines (yellow line) in the agribusiness sector, generating TCO forecasts and GHG reduction.

features.engine_detail: Crosses Base Machine (Loader, Excavator, Skid) with an Agricultural Segment (Sugarcane, Forestry, Livestock).
features.insights_detail: Instantly returns feasibility levels and hydraulic/technological stabilization needs.
features.flow_detail: Visual representation of the process (Machine → AI Validation → Compatible Implement).
features.dashboards_detail: Monitors Cumulative Cost (TCO) KPIs vs Standard Operation. Shows Maintenance and GHG benefits.

tips: Use Backhoe or Skid Loader options to see high productivity leaps in Livestock operations.
The Assistant button (NEXUS AI) will read the page and tell you the applicability of each setup.
convergence.examplePrompt: How does the Wheel Loader (E-Series) behave when operating in the sugarcane sector?

flows.intro: Modules connect through workflows that guide analysis from insight to action. Each flow represents a typical platform use case.

metrics.intro: Glossary of metrics used across the platform. All scales are numerical and colors follow a universal pattern.
metrics.fit_desc: Suitability of machine to the region
metrics.winrate_desc: % of sales won over total decisions
metrics.parity_desc: Average delta CASE vs best competitor

assistant.title: NexusChat — AI Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Available on any page via the 💬 icon in the bottom right corner
assistant.step1: 1. Click the chat icon (💬) in the bottom right corner
assistant.step2: 2. Type your question or use a suggested prompt
assistant.step3: 3. The AI automatically receives the current page context
assistant.analyzeBtn_desc: which populates the chat with a contextual prompt — ideal for deep-diving into subsystems, roadmap items, field patterns, or competitive signals.

convergence.title: Construction-Ag Convergence
convergence.desc: NEXUS Engine Analysis: Cross-over between Construction and Agriculture segments, optimizing TCO through specialized attachments and automation.
convergence.setupDesc: Select base machine and segment to simulate automation ROI and hydraulic synergy.

ghg.title: Detail: GHG Reduction
ghg.content: Emission reduction is achieved through work cycle optimization and attachment electrification. In sugarcane operations, the use of optimized construction machines reduces fuel consumption per ton moved by up to 22%.

opexTco.title: Detail: Opex/TCO
opexTco.content: Convergence allows for common parts sharing between construction and agricultural fleets (PMP). TCO is reduced by diluting maintenance costs and increasing machine versatility across multiple crop windows.

failuresMaint.title: Detail: Maintenance and Failures
failuresMaint.content: Redundant hydraulic systems and advanced telemetry enable predictive maintenance. Using approved attachments reduces thermal stress on the hydraulic system, increasing component life by 15%.

sucroenergetico.insight: Constant flow ideal for collector brooms and bagasse handling in mills.

graos.insight: High capacity bucket optimizes grain loading in warehouses and ports.

fertilizantes.insight: Special painting and component sealing against saline and corrosive environments.

pecuaria.insight: Essential for silage loading and feedlot yard cleaning.

florestal.insight: Load Sensing system optimizes timber processing cycle with harvester heads.

sucroenergetico.insight: Ideal for vinasse canal cleaning and contour bund construction.

graos.insight: Soil drainage and precision irrigation canal excavation to prevent waterlogging in crops.

aves.insight: Low height and zero turning radius allow for rapid cleaning of poultry house bedding.

pecuaria.insight: Agile handling of hay bales and corral cleaning in tight spaces.

sucroenergetico.insight: Cleaning residues under conveyor belts and difficult access areas in mills.

leite.insight: Total versatility for drainage maintenance, fencing, and input handling on dairy farms.

cafe.insight: Ideal for fertilizing trench opening and internal road maintenance on steep terrain.

aves.insight: Support in shed construction and moving heavy materials outside poultry houses.

curvas_nivel.insight: Millimetric blade control essential for soil conservation and erosion control.

graos.insight: Precision grading for large-scale planting, optimizing harvester traffic.

algodao.insight: Superior vertical reach and stability for bale stacking at great heights.

pecuaria.insight: Telescopic reach facilitates feeding high mixers and shed maintenance.

innovation.title: Global Trends & Next Gen
innovation.subtitle: Technological evolution of the yellow line integrated with the agro ecosystem.
